assignments.twist: one-dimensional two-sublattice Ising ferrimagnet with unequal magnetic moments in a field, exploiting a hidden degenerate excited state for finite-T phase switching

core_model_summary: A one-dimensional Ising-type ferrimagnet with pairwise spin coupling and a magnetic field on two sublattices of unequal moment, whose energy Hamiltonian hosts a hidden half-ice half-fire excited state driving finite-temperature phase switching.
